# Copy out of a read-only source tree (Go module cache, vendored checkout).
# Copy never writes the source, so it must not O_CREATE a sidecar lock next
# to it — that fails EACCES in a 0555 directory. The source pre-image is
# still verified lock-free at commit (ADR-0001 Amendment 2).
[GOOS:windows] skip 'read-only directory bits do not block file creation on windows'
[root] skip 'root creates through permission bits'
chmod 0555 ro
exec sflit -source ro/big.go -sink sub/small.go -regex '^Filter'
cmp sub/small.go expected_small.go
cmp ro/big.go expected_big.go

exec gotypecheck ro/big.go
exec gotypecheck sub/small.go
chmod 0755 ro
-- ro/big.go --
package p

func FilterA() int { return 1 }
func Other() int   { return 2 }
-- expected_big.go --
package p

func FilterA() int { return 1 }
func Other() int   { return 2 }
-- expected_small.go --
package p

func FilterA() int { return 1 }
